title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
